name: Neto by Maropost Release Notes – 22 Sep 2020
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Release Version","bold":true},{"text":": 6.121"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Bug Fixes","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue in sales orders where the suburb selected wouldn't load if there were too many discounts active."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue that caused an error when trying to create an order from the abandoned checkout log report."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue that prevented vouchers from being used to pay for orders in the control panel if a Stripe payment method was set as the default."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue that caused an error when importing images from the imagedrop folder."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue where orders would be put on hold, incorrectly saying the payment didn't match the order total."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]
